title: Shulker Inventory Access
description: Access your Shulker in your hand and open the shulker without placing
body:
Shulker Inventory Access

Access your Shulker in your hand

You can access the Shulkers inventory without placing (not available in version 1.0.0)

Fully Client-Side function, works on most every Server

in newer version, there will be more functions like fast switching and directly access from your inventory

If you encounter any bugs, please report them on the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/HCHNdEXA). New announcements will also be posted there.
